column96: I have been self employed most of my professional life and ran a high stress lifestyle. I have had 2 divorces which was also impactful on my mental health.   I started to search for answers a few years ago as I noticed my ability to make decisions had deteriorated, possibly from stress. I began to develop tremors in my right arm mid this year and am now being treated for PD. Due to medication my tremors are lessoning but still present.   I am having some side effects from my medications, mostly constipation and ED which is now subsided but I am taking Testosterone.   I can record my mental alertness levels and change of ability to accomplish tasks if it is helpful. I do notice I am very slow to get things done and my ability to carry on an in-depth conversation is greatly reduced. I fluctuate in my ability to have a lively conversation.   I sense that my will power to resist certain things has been reduced. I normally can easily avoid alcohol when I feel it is not a good time to drink but lately if others are around I have not been able to resist the temptation.  I do not have a drinking issue but I wanted to avoid drinks as I am lined up for surgery on my knee on Oct 27th.  Other things to know about me;  - I have hearing aids and hearing issues at times.  - I am having my left knee replaced Oct 27th through a private clinic.   - I have ADHD which I have been able to work with over my life.  - If you want more info on my journey with PD, please ask.

column6: cancer: enlever globe superieur  droit ( février 2021)  et  operer métastase glande surrénale droite ( novembre 2022)      Parkinson : Depuis janvier 2015 plusieurs symtomes, j'ai passé d'innombrables examens pour éliminer d'autres maladies avec des symptomes similaires.   Finalement c'est en 2022 que mes tremblements ont commencé. Avec tous mes symptomes (depuis 2015) mes tremblements plus quelques tests manuels ils m'ont  diagnostiqué Pakinson. Ma neurologue m'a prescrit des : levocarb (sinemet) 3x par jour, qui me rend malade (vomisement) . Depuis 2023 ma neurologue a pris sa retraite et je n'ai plus de specialiste pour s'occupper de moi. Mes douleurs augmentent partout dans mon corps, les forces dans mes mains et mes jambes diminuent rapidement. Mon language (surtout quand fatigué, ) je cherche mes mots et souvent je pense a un mot et c'est un autre mot qui sort de ma bouche.   IL y a surment des medicaments pour ralentir un peu la maladie.

column96: Did recreational drugs at university then stopped. Tried Sante Cannabis in an attempt to improve sleep and to address pain.    Took:	CBD 25:1  		CBD 10:13  		Nabilone 0.5 mg  Didn't notice any improvement, although sleep was better with the nabilone.  Gets back aches from bad posture.  Short term memory is not as bad as my long term (part of the issue might be lack of attention)  Lost sense of smell 5 to 7 years before diagnosis.  Played hockey as a kid (1 concussion), and again as an adult for about 15 years (checked into the boards once lost consciousness for a few seconds) did a lot of skiing when younger. At University played varsity ice hockey, basketball, volleyball and tennis. Played competitive squash and taught tennis and squash.

column96: I fall asleep readily, but wake regularly during the night to urinate. I had cancer of the prostate and lymph nodes, and was treated with radiation and female hormones from 2017 to 2022, but have been declared as being in remission. I do not know my uncles/aunts and cousins because my father's career caused my family to move regularly across Canada. I have a brother who is an alcoholic drug user, but don't know whether or not he has Parkinsons.  I stopped drinking upon diagnosis with Parkinsons in February 2023.
